channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: With the white nationalist group Patriot Front, what you see is not what you get
item.description: Hundreds of masked white nationalists marched in the nation's capital on July Fourth. Who were they and where does their funding come from?

item.title: Trump threatens Iran after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral saw calls for his killing
item.description: Trump made the comments on his Truth Social after U.S. officials demanded that Iran make a public statement saying the Strait of Hormuz is open.

item.title: Virtual reality dance partners help shy people find their rhythm
item.description: Apps like Dance Guru and Trip the Light provide a judgment-free way to learn partner dancing through VR.

item.title: Minnesota pulls troops early from D.C. as pressure on Michigan grows
item.description: Governor Tim Walz is withdrawing National Guard troops from Washington, D.C. amid criticism of Democratic governors sending troops to the city.
